name: Volgistics Volunteer Management API
what_it_does: Volgistics REST API for volunteer management software. Enables AI agents to manage volunteer records and profiles, retrieve volunteer scheduling and assignments, access volunteer hour tracking and service records, handle volunteer application and onboarding workflows, manage background check status, retrieve service site and program data, generate volunteer reporting and analytics, and integrate volunteer data with donor management and nonprofit CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing volunteer records and service history from nonprofit coordination agents
Scheduling volunteers for events and service opportunities from operations agents
Tracking volunteer hours and generating service reports from analytics agents
Integrating volunteer data with donor management systems from nonprofit CRM agents
not_for: Paid staff management without volunteer-specific workflows
Commercial event staffing without nonprofit volunteer management focus
Political volunteer organizing without general nonprofit volunteer management
best_when: A nonprofit organization, hospital, museum, or government agency using Volgistics wants AI agents to automate volunteer scheduling, hour tracking, communication, and reporting workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Volunteer PII including background check results, emergency contacts, and service records require careful handling. Background check data has specific retention and sharing restrictions. Volunteer contact data used for outreach must comply with CAN-SPAM.

auth.notes: Volgistics uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. No granular scope control. API available on higher-tier plans. Limited public developer documentation. Integration primarily via CSV export and API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; nonprofit pricing available
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly pricing based on active volunteer records; nonprofit discounts available
pricing.notes: Grand Haven, Michigan. Founded 2001. Market leader for volunteer management software. Used by 3,000+ organizations. Hospitals, nonprofits, government agencies, faith-based organizations, museums. API available on higher-tier plans. Competes with Better Impact and VolunteerHub.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Volunteer PII and background check data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — API key only with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for volunteer activity updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Background check result data has specific retention and sharing restrictions
API available only on higher-tier plans — confirm subscription level before integrating
agent_readiness.security_notes: Volunteer PII and background check data. SOC2. API key only. US data residency. Background check retention restrictions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Volunteer PII and background check data. SOC2. API key only. US data residency. Background check data restrictions.
